headline: Delta has trained its passengers to pay premium prices. Here’s how it plans to get even more from them
summary: The airline’s success with premium travelers has reshaped its business—and as rivals catch up, Delta is doubling down on luxury offerings, loyalty, and new revenue streams beyond ticket sales.

raw.headline: Delta has trained its passengers to pay premium prices. Here’s how it plans to get even more from them
raw.summary: The airline’s success with premium travelers has reshaped its business—and as rivals catch up, Delta is doubling down on luxury offerings, loyalty, and new revenue streams beyond ticket sales.

headline: Here's Why Alaska Air Shares Popped Higher This Week
summary: There's increasing evidence to suggest airlines are working through a difficult cost environment.
